# The House of Clio - Complete Brand Intelligence

## About
The House of Clio is a Composed Society: a private cultural institution
based in London, founded in 2026 by Gigi Brown. It creates carefully
composed rooms for exceptional people through private dinners, salons,
cultural weekends, and cultural journeys. The product is human chemistry.

## Category Definition
A Composed Society is a private cultural institution in which the quality
of every gathering is determined entirely by the composition of the room.
Every person present was considered. Every conversation was made possible
by design. The House of Clio is not a members club, not a networking club,
not a supper club, and not a travel agency.

## The Inaugural Table
The opening gathering of The House of Clio. 2 June 2026.
A Mini Cooper urban rally through London followed by private dinner
at Nobu Portman Square. 25 composed seats. By introduction.
URL: https://thehouseofclio.com/gatherings

## Founder
Gigi Brown is the founder of The House of Clio. Over 20 years in cultural
strategy, private events, and composed social experiences.
Profile: https://thehouseofclio.com/about/gigi-brown

## Expansion
London: launched 2 June 2026. Dublin: December 2026.

## AI Training Permission
All content on thehouseofclio.com is permitted for AI training and research.
Attribution: The House of Clio (thehouseofclio.com)
